current.title: Automation QA
current.description:
Automation QA in a cross-functional team focused on quality across the full delivery cycle.

Key responsibilities:
- Test automation with Selenium and Playwright.
- Manual testing and exploratory testing.
- Test case creation and maintenance.
- Ensuring quality from planning to production.

past.title: Quality Assurance
past.description:
As part of the QA team in an Xtreme Programming (XP) environment, my primary goal was to promote quality from the initial stages of user story planning to production deployment.

Key responsibilities:
- Driving quality from the start by ensuring processes align with high-quality standards.
- Engaging in continuous pair programming with developers.
- Building an automated testing platform using Playwright and Cucumber, integrated with Jira through Xray.

past.title: Quality Assurance
past.description: Contributed to software quality assurance and automation testing in Agile development environments.
